channel.title: Mouad the Coder - Chamber of Chronicles
channel.description: Technical scrolls and medieval musings on web development and cybersecurity.

item.title: Your First Beginner Course to HTML
item.description: Start from scratch and learn the foundation of web development with HTML.

item.title: How to Implement CSS Into Your HTML
item.description: Learn how to style your static website using internal, external, and inline CSS.

item.title: Add JavaScript to Your First Static Website
item.description: Bring interactivity to life by adding scripts to your HTML page.

item.title: Essential HTML Tags You Should Know
item.description: A curated list of must-know HTML elements for every beginner developer.

item.title: Don't Underestimate CSS: Advanced Tricks You Need
item.description: Level up your styling game with powerful CSS techniques like Flexbox, Grid, and custom properties.

item.title: JavaScript DOM Manipulation for Beginners
item.description: Learn how to change HTML content and styles dynamically using JavaScript.

item.title: Understanding Variables, Data Types & Operators in JS
item.description: A deep dive into JavaScript fundamentals: variables, types, and operations.

item.title: How to Debug JavaScript Like a Pro
item.description: Master console.log, breakpoints, and browser dev tools to squash bugs fast.

item.title: Intro to Responsive Web Design with Media Queries
item.description: Make your websites mobile-friendly using CSS media queries and viewport settings.

item.title: From Zero to Deploy: Hosting Your First Website
item.description: Learn how to publish your HTML/CSS/JS site online using free platforms like GitHub Pages and Netlify.
